prompt: Change the active date of the calendar to 05/12/2025.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which shows a calendar for May 2025. Change the active date to May 12, 2025. This requires deselecting the current active date, '11' (marked with a blue circular highlight in the second row of dates, second from the right), and selecting '12' by applying a similar blue circular highlight to it (located in the third row of dates, first from the left).
objects: weekday labels (M, T, W, T, F, S, S)
week numbers (e.g., 18, 19, ..., 23) on the left side
blue circular highlight on date '11' (should not be present)
